records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Coffin of Asmodeus... hphphp days passed since initial operation.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Coffin of Asmodeus... hphphp days passed since initial operation.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Coffin of Asmodeus... hphphp days passed since initial operation.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Corruption rays from the crevice and Qlipha contamination density gradually increasing.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Corruption rays from the crevice and Qlipha contamination density gradually increasing.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Corruption rays from the crevice and Qlipha contamination density gradually increasing.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Estimated time until critical point... 472 hours.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Estimated time until critical point... 472 hours.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Estimated time until critical point... 472 hours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sky bleeds crimson.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sky bleeds crimson.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sky bleeds crimson.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's as if it knows the end is about to unfold.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's as if it knows the end is about to unfold.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's as if it knows the end is about to unfold.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is the same ordinary sunset we've always seen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is the same ordinary sunset we've always seen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is the same ordinary sunset we've always seen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I can't deny that the red hue reminds me of our enemy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I can't deny that the red hue reminds me of our enemy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I can't deny that the red hue reminds me of our enemy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That Demon Lord's alias... wasn't it the Queen of Ashes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That Demon Lord's alias... wasn't it the Queen of Ashes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That Demon Lord's alias... wasn't it the Queen of Ashes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They say that even the northern front formed by the three great powers fell in just two days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They say that even the northern front formed by the three great powers fell in just two days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They say that even the northern front formed by the three great powers fell in just two days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. And it was by pure force, without any tricks or gimmicks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. And it was by pure force, without any tricks or gimmicks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. And it was by pure force, without any tricks or gimmicks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we didn't activate the Coffin, the whole continent would be buried in ashes by now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we didn't activate the Coffin, the whole continent would be buried in ashes by now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we didn't activate the Coffin, the whole continent would be buried in ashes by now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But nothing has been resolved. This Coffin is just a temporary measure to buy some time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But nothing has been resolved. This Coffin is just a temporary measure to buy some time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But nothing has been resolved. This Coffin is just a temporary measure to buy some time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's more than enough!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's more than enough!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's more than enough!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to it, we safely met with the Antagonist and raised the Wolf into a great warrior!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to it, we safely met with the Antagonist and raised the Wolf into a great warrior!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to it, we safely met with the Antagonist and raised the Wolf into a great warrior!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was Hilde who raised the Wolf, not you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was Hilde who raised the Wolf, not you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was Hilde who raised the Wolf, not you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think we can win... against that monster?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think we can win... against that monster?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think we can win... against that monster?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander Yulia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander Yulia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander Yulia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you willing to risk in order to save the world?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you willing to risk in order to save the world?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you willing to risk in order to save the world?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll give my life if it means that we can win.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll give my life if it means that we can win.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll give my life if it means that we can win.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excellent determination!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excellent determination!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excellent determination!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm certain we'll win as long as that determination doesn't break!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm certain we'll win as long as that determination doesn't break!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm certain we'll win as long as that determination doesn't break!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you always have to get all up in my face when we talk?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you always have to get all up in my face when we talk?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you always have to get all up in my face when we talk?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Let's go eat something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... Let's go eat something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Let's go eat something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I admire your spirit, but we won't have the energy to fight if we don't eat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I admire your spirit, but we won't have the energy to fight if we don't eat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I admire your spirit, but we won't have the energy to fight if we don't eat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good thinking!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good thinking!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good thinking!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Each division of the Administration mobilizes according to their respective roles.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Each division of the Administration mobilizes according to their respective roles.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Each division of the Administration mobilizes according to their respective roles.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The orders from the Command are there for responding to unexpected variables, and battles are basically left to the discretion and active judgment of the division Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The orders from the Command are there for responding to unexpected variables, and battles are basically left to the discretion and active judgment of the division Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The orders from the Command are there for responding to unexpected variables, and battles are basically left to the discretion and active judgment of the division Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um, Master.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, Master.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, Master.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, which division do I belong to?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, which division do I belong to?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, which division do I belong to?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't need to be in a division, Pavlin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't need to be in a division, Pavlin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't need to be in a division, Pavlin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your role as the Antagonist is to fight the Demon Lord, and we will be with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your role as the Antagonist is to fight the Demon Lord, and we will be with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your role as the Antagonist is to fight the Demon Lord, and we will be with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can I... win against the Demon Lord? I don't even know how to swing a sword like you, Master...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can I... win against the Demon Lord? I don't even know how to swing a sword like you, Master...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can I... win against the Demon Lord? I don't even know how to swing a sword like you, Master...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have a special talent for interfering with the Qlipha dimension.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have a special talent for interfering with the Qlipha dimension.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have a special talent for interfering with the Qlipha dimension.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the battle that will take place one day, you will pave the way to the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the battle that will take place one day, you will pave the way to the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the battle that will take place one day, you will pave the way to the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that the Wolf's fangs can puncture the Demon Lord's heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that the Wolf's fangs can puncture the Demon Lord's heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that the Wolf's fangs can puncture the Demon Lord's heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll try my best, Master.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll try my best, Master.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll try my best, Master.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you not to call me that. I am not your master.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you not to call me that. I am not your master.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you not to call me that. I am not your master.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have not and will not teach you swordsmanship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have not and will not teach you swordsmanship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have not and will not teach you swordsmanship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swinging a sword with your weak physical constitution, you won't be able to defeat a stray cat, let alone a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swinging a sword with your weak physical constitution, you won't be able to defeat a stray cat, let alone a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swinging a sword with your weak physical constitution, you won't be able to defeat a stray cat, let alone a Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eh he he... Stray cats can be kinda scary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eh he he... Stray cats can be kinda scary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eh he he... Stray cats can be kinda scary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still. I'm going to keep calling you Master.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But still. I'm going to keep calling you Master.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But still. I'm going to keep calling you Master.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You appeared out of the blue with the Administration and saved our world from Corruption...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You appeared out of the blue with the Administration and saved our world from Corruption...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You appeared out of the blue with the Administration and saved our world from Corruption...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Above all, you taught me, this timid person who knew nothing of the world, how to use my powers for good.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Above all, you taught me, this timid person who knew nothing of the world, how to use my powers for good.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Above all, you taught me, this timid person who knew nothing of the world, how to use my powers for good.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Do as you please.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Do as you please.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Do as you please.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But don't be mistaken. We are merely helping you. It's entirely up to you to save this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But don't be mistaken. We are merely helping you. It's entirely up to you to save this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But don't be mistaken. We are merely helping you. It's entirely up to you to save this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You mustn't be careless with your life or give it up. Do you understand?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You mustn't be careless with your life or give it up. Do you understand?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You mustn't be careless with your life or give it up. Do you understand?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will save this world with my powers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will save this world with my powers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will save this world with my powers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, it has finally begun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, it has finally begun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, it has finally begun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We could've used the Ark to contain the Demon Lord's power before she made her move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We could've used the Ark to contain the Demon Lord's power before she made her move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We could've used the Ark to contain the Demon Lord's power before she made her move.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Buy time by sacrificing the Ark, or use it to attack the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Buy time by sacrificing the Ark, or use it to attack the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Buy time by sacrificing the Ark, or use it to attack the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I chose the latter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I chose the latter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I chose the latter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it your first time facing a Qliphoth Game head-on?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it your first time facing a Qliphoth Game head-on?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it your first time facing a Qliphoth Game head-on?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think we have a chance to win if we attack?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think we have a chance to win if we attack?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think we have a chance to win if we attack?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The possibilities have always existed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The possibilities have always existed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The possibilities have always existed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All means available under the Administration, the Antagonist, and the Wolf have all gathered in one place. This is as hopeful as it can get.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All means available under the Administration, the Antagonist, and the Wolf have all gathered in one place. This is as hopeful as it can get.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All means available under the Administration, the Antagonist, and the Wolf have all gathered in one place. This is as hopeful as it can get.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can feel it. The Demon Lord is approaching.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can feel it. The Demon Lord is approaching.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can feel it. The Demon Lord is approaching.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter. For we must also move forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter. For we must also move forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter. For we must also move forward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you familiarized yourself with the rules?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you familiarized yourself with the rules?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you familiarized yourself with the rules?

records.m_Talk_ENG: More or less.
records.m_Talk_DEU: More or less.
records.m_Talk_FRA: More or less.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hilde. Aren't you nervous?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hilde. Aren't you nervous?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hilde. Aren't you nervous?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a fight we had to face one day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a fight we had to face one day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a fight we had to face one day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All I'm thinking about is a way to win at any cost.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All I'm thinking about is a way to win at any cost.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All I'm thinking about is a way to win at any cost.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, that's so you, Hilde.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, that's so you, Hilde.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, that's so you, Hilde.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How are you, Pavlin?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How are you, Pavlin?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How are you, Pavlin?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Tyrant of the North burned down my home. Soon, she'll set aflame the entire world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Tyrant of the North burned down my home. Soon, she'll set aflame the entire world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Tyrant of the North burned down my home. Soon, she'll set aflame the entire world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I can be of help in stopping her...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I can be of help in stopping her...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I can be of help in stopping her...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will gladly offer my life for it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will gladly offer my life for it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will gladly offer my life for it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She will go down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She will go down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She will go down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is why we're here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is why we're here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is why we're here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: 1 hour 10 minutes since the start of the battle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: 1 hour 10 minutes since the start of the battle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: 1 hour 10 minutes since the start of the battle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: 87% of all available units are lost. Time until the forefront collapses is estimated to be under 15 minutes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: 87% of all available units are lost. Time until the forefront collapses is estimated to be under 15 minutes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: 87% of all available units are lost. Time until the forefront collapses is estimated to be under 15 minutes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the Demon Lord's throne is not far away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the Demon Lord's throne is not far away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the Demon Lord's throne is not far away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If only we could keep those two Apostles occupied... the Wolf would be able to safely reach the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If only we could keep those two Apostles occupied... the Wolf would be able to safely reach the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If only we could keep those two Apostles occupied... the Wolf would be able to safely reach the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are currently two divisions under proper command and control.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are currently two divisions under proper command and control.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are currently two divisions under proper command and control.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The two divisions can obstruct the Apostles' movements until the path is cleared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The two divisions can obstruct the Apostles' movements until the path is cleared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The two divisions can obstruct the Apostles' movements until the path is cleared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is the likelihood of the two divisions returning safely if they were to be deployed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is the likelihood of the two divisions returning safely if they were to be deployed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is the likelihood of the two divisions returning safely if they were to be deployed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is insufficient data on the target.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is insufficient data on the target.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is insufficient data on the target.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unless an outlier occurs, they are expected to be annihilated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unless an outlier occurs, they are expected to be annihilated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unless an outlier occurs, they are expected to be annihilated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They keep trying to block me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They keep trying to block me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They keep trying to block me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With all these C.O.s coming at me like this, I can't easily move forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With all these C.O.s coming at me like this, I can't easily move forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With all these C.O.s coming at me like this, I can't easily move forward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The supporting artillery seems to have stopped. Have they all been wiped out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The supporting artillery seems to have stopped. Have they all been wiped out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The supporting artillery seems to have stopped. Have they all been wiped out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm certain that we're almost there...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm certain that we're almost there...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm certain that we're almost there...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll keep Asmodeus' Apostles distracted! In the meantime, you two should go ahead!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll keep Asmodeus' Apostles distracted! In the meantime, you two should go ahead!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll keep Asmodeus' Apostles distracted! In the meantime, you two should go ahead!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's reckless. If we do that, you'll die before we get to reach the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's reckless. If we do that, you'll die before we get to reach the Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's reckless. If we do that, you'll die before we get to reach the Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Too many have already been sacrificed to get here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Too many have already been sacrificed to get here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Too many have already been sacrificed to get here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't turn back now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't turn back now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't turn back now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Pavlin. Acting recklessly will only result in losing whatever chances we have left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, Pavlin. Acting recklessly will only result in losing whatever chances we have left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, Pavlin. Acting recklessly will only result in losing whatever chances we have left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides... you're responsible for another life now, remember?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides... you're responsible for another life now, remember?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides... you're responsible for another life now, remember?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Master! Look out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Master! Look out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Master! Look out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! There's even an Eater now? What a bother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! There's even an Eater now? What a bother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! There's even an Eater now? What a bother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a huge hole in the C.O.'s body...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a huge hole in the C.O.'s body...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a huge hole in the C.O.'s body...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A dimension jump from an Assault Ship? Someone charged into a C.O. with that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A dimension jump from an Assault Ship? Someone charged into a C.O. with that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A dimension jump from an Assault Ship? Someone charged into a C.O. with that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's only one who's stupid enough to do something like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's only one who's stupid enough to do something like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's only one who's stupid enough to do something like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is Commander Aura of the La Mancha Stormtrooper Division...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is Commander Aura of the La Mancha Stormtrooper Division...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is Commander Aura of the La Mancha Stormtrooper Division...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've come to help after receiving orders from the Command!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've come to help after receiving orders from the Command!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've come to help after receiving orders from the Command!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would have been injured if your aim had been slightly off, Aura.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would have been injured if your aim had been slightly off, Aura.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would have been injured if your aim had been slightly off, Aura.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine! I may have devised this plan, but my skilled pilot Yulia was in charge of inputting the coordinates for the dimension jump!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine! I may have devised this plan, but my skilled pilot Yulia was in charge of inputting the coordinates for the dimension jump!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine! I may have devised this plan, but my skilled pilot Yulia was in charge of inputting the coordinates for the dimension jump!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is Yulia of the Sirin Tracking Division. We have also come with orders to help the Wolf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is Yulia of the Sirin Tracking Division. We have also come with orders to help the Wolf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is Yulia of the Sirin Tracking Division. We have also come with orders to help the Wolf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness. They are all safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank goodness. They are all safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank goodness. They are all safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The other divisions are nearly wiped out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The other divisions are nearly wiped out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The other divisions are nearly wiped out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It will be difficult to expect them to join us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It will be difficult to expect them to join us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It will be difficult to expect them to join us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That can't be...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That can't be...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That can't be...

records.m_Talk_ENG: In just that brief moment, all those people... died in vain...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In just that brief moment, all those people... died in vain...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In just that brief moment, all those people... died in vain...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand your anger, but you must stay calm, Pavlin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understand your anger, but you must stay calm, Pavlin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand your anger, but you must stay calm, Pavlin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because we, the survivors, decide the outcome of this fight and the fate of the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because we, the survivors, decide the outcome of this fight and the fate of the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because we, the survivors, decide the outcome of this fight and the fate of the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes... I'm aware.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes... I'm aware.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes... I'm aware.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. The Command told you to help us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. The Command told you to help us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. The Command told you to help us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct! They told us that you would need units to hold off the Apostles!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct! They told us that you would need units to hold off the Apostles!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct! They told us that you would need units to hold off the Apostles!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We will isolate the two Apostles in a small space by borrowing Pavlin's dimension-splitting ability, and our two divisions will each take on one of them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We will isolate the two Apostles in a small space by borrowing Pavlin's dimension-splitting ability, and our two divisions will each take on one of them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We will isolate the two Apostles in a small space by borrowing Pavlin's dimension-splitting ability, and our two divisions will each take on one of them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That does sound like a surefire way to keep the Apostles busy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That does sound like a surefire way to keep the Apostles busy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That does sound like a surefire way to keep the Apostles busy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that will also block your escape routes. Do you understand what that means?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that will also block your escape routes. Do you understand what that means?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that will also block your escape routes. Do you understand what that means?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry! Retreat is not an option for us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry! Retreat is not an option for us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry! Retreat is not an option for us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If this were a safe and normal operation, the Command's Paradox wouldn't have called it "Plan B."
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this were a safe and normal operation, the Command's Paradox wouldn't have called it "Plan B."
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this were a safe and normal operation, the Command's Paradox wouldn't have called it "Plan B."

records.m_Talk_ENG: If this is the best way to save the world... we will follow through with the orders given to us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this is the best way to save the world... we will follow through with the orders given to us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this is the best way to save the world... we will follow through with the orders given to us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, we'll leave those two to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, we'll leave those two to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, we'll leave those two to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...The Apostles' signature waveforms have sequentially disappeared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...The Apostles' signature waveforms have sequentially disappeared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...The Apostles' signature waveforms have sequentially disappeared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have confirmed that the Apostle isolation was a success.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have confirmed that the Apostle isolation was a success.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have confirmed that the Apostle isolation was a success.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The estimated isolation time is 20 minutes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The estimated isolation time is 20 minutes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The estimated isolation time is 20 minutes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this... only the last step remains.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this... only the last step remains.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this... only the last step remains.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Wolf is approaching the throne.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Wolf is approaching the throne.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Wolf is approaching the throne.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I almost thought no one was coming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I almost thought no one was coming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I almost thought no one was coming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To be skilled enough to reach here can only mean...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To be skilled enough to reach here can only mean...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To be skilled enough to reach here can only mean...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You will be able to entertain me, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You will be able to entertain me, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You will be able to entertain me, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't wait for me just to chat, did you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't wait for me just to chat, did you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't wait for me just to chat, did you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, shut up and come at me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, shut up and come at me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, shut up and come at me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I commend your spirit, Wolf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I commend your spirit, Wolf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I commend your spirit, Wolf.

root.m_SubTitle_ENG: Coffin of Asmodeus... hphphp days passed since initial operation.
root.m_SubTitle_DEU: Coffin of Asmodeus... hphphp days passed since initial operation.
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: Coffin of Asmodeus... hphphp days passed since initial operation.

root.m_SubTitle_ENG: Corruption rays from the crevice and Qlipha contamination density gradually increasing.
root.m_SubTitle_DEU: Corruption rays from the crevice and Qlipha contamination density gradually increasing.
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: Corruption rays from the crevice and Qlipha contamination density gradually increasing.

root.m_SubTitle_ENG: Estimated time until critical point... 472 hours.
root.m_SubTitle_DEU: Estimated time until critical point... 472 hours.
root.m_SubTitle_FRA: Estimated time until critical point... 472 hours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The sky bleeds crimson.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The sky bleeds crimson.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The sky bleeds crimson.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's as if it knows the end is about to unfold.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's as if it knows the end is about to unfold.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's as if it knows the end is about to unfold.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is the same ordinary sunset we've always seen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is the same ordinary sunset we've always seen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is the same ordinary sunset we've always seen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I can't deny that the red hue reminds me of our enemy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I can't deny that the red hue reminds me of our enemy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I can't deny that the red hue reminds me of our enemy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That Demon Lord's alias... wasn't it the Queen of Ashes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That Demon Lord's alias... wasn't it the Queen of Ashes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That Demon Lord's alias... wasn't it the Queen of Ashes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: They say that even the northern front formed by the three great powers fell in just two days.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They say that even the northern front formed by the three great powers fell in just two days.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They say that even the northern front formed by the three great powers fell in just two days.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. And it was by pure force, without any tricks or gimmicks.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. And it was by pure force, without any tricks or gimmicks.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. And it was by pure force, without any tricks or gimmicks.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we didn't activate the Coffin, the whole continent would be buried in ashes by now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we didn't activate the Coffin, the whole continent would be buried in ashes by now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we didn't activate the Coffin, the whole continent would be buried in ashes by now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But nothing has been resolved. This Coffin is just a temporary measure to buy some time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But nothing has been resolved. This Coffin is just a temporary measure to buy some time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But nothing has been resolved. This Coffin is just a temporary measure to buy some time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's more than enough!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's more than enough!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's more than enough!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to it, we safely met with the Antagonist and raised the Wolf into a great warrior!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to it, we safely met with the Antagonist and raised the Wolf into a great warrior!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to it, we safely met with the Antagonist and raised the Wolf into a great warrior!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was Hilde who raised the Wolf, not you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was Hilde who raised the Wolf, not you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was Hilde who raised the Wolf, not you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think we can win... against that monster?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think we can win... against that monster?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think we can win... against that monster?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Commander Yulia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Commander Yulia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Commander Yulia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you willing to risk in order to save the world?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you willing to risk in order to save the world?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you willing to risk in order to save the world?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Everything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Everything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Everything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll give my life if it means that we can win.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll give my life if it means that we can win.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll give my life if it means that we can win.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Excellent determination!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Excellent determination!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Excellent determination!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm certain we'll win as long as that determination doesn't break!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm certain we'll win as long as that determination doesn't break!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm certain we'll win as long as that determination doesn't break!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you always have to get all up in my face when we talk?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you always have to get all up in my face when we talk?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you always have to get all up in my face when we talk?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Let's go eat something.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... Let's go eat something.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Let's go eat something.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I admire your spirit, but we won't have the energy to fight if we don't eat.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I admire your spirit, but we won't have the energy to fight if we don't eat.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I admire your spirit, but we won't have the energy to fight if we don't eat.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good thinking!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good thinking!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good thinking!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Each division of the Administration mobilizes according to their respective roles.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Each division of the Administration mobilizes according to their respective roles.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Each division of the Administration mobilizes according to their respective roles.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The orders from the Command are there for responding to unexpected variables, and battles are basically left to the discretion and active judgment of the division Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The orders from the Command are there for responding to unexpected variables, and battles are basically left to the discretion and active judgment of the division Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The orders from the Command are there for responding to unexpected variables, and battles are basically left to the discretion and active judgment of the division Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um, Master.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um, Master.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um, Master.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, which division do I belong to?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, which division do I belong to?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, which division do I belong to?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You don't need to be in a division, Pavlin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You don't need to be in a division, Pavlin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You don't need to be in a division, Pavlin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your role as the Antagonist is to fight the Demon Lord, and we will be with you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your role as the Antagonist is to fight the Demon Lord, and we will be with you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your role as the Antagonist is to fight the Demon Lord, and we will be with you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can I... win against the Demon Lord? I don't even know how to swing a sword like you, Master...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can I... win against the Demon Lord? I don't even know how to swing a sword like you, Master...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can I... win against the Demon Lord? I don't even know how to swing a sword like you, Master...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have a special talent for interfering with the Qlipha dimension.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have a special talent for interfering with the Qlipha dimension.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have a special talent for interfering with the Qlipha dimension.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the battle that will take place one day, you will pave the way to the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the battle that will take place one day, you will pave the way to the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the battle that will take place one day, you will pave the way to the Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that the Wolf's fangs can puncture the Demon Lord's heart.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that the Wolf's fangs can puncture the Demon Lord's heart.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that the Wolf's fangs can puncture the Demon Lord's heart.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll try my best, Master.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll try my best, Master.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll try my best, Master.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I told you not to call me that. I am not your master.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I told you not to call me that. I am not your master.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I told you not to call me that. I am not your master.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have not and will not teach you swordsmanship.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have not and will not teach you swordsmanship.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have not and will not teach you swordsmanship.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Swinging a sword with your weak physical constitution, you won't be able to defeat a stray cat, let alone a Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Swinging a sword with your weak physical constitution, you won't be able to defeat a stray cat, let alone a Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Swinging a sword with your weak physical constitution, you won't be able to defeat a stray cat, let alone a Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eh he he... Stray cats can be kinda scary.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eh he he... Stray cats can be kinda scary.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eh he he... Stray cats can be kinda scary.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But still. I'm going to keep calling you Master.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But still. I'm going to keep calling you Master.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But still. I'm going to keep calling you Master.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You appeared out of the blue with the Administration and saved our world from Corruption...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You appeared out of the blue with the Administration and saved our world from Corruption...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You appeared out of the blue with the Administration and saved our world from Corruption...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Above all, you taught me, this timid person who knew nothing of the world, how to use my powers for good.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Above all, you taught me, this timid person who knew nothing of the world, how to use my powers for good.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Above all, you taught me, this timid person who knew nothing of the world, how to use my powers for good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Do as you please.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Do as you please.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Do as you please.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But don't be mistaken. We are merely helping you. It's entirely up to you to save this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But don't be mistaken. We are merely helping you. It's entirely up to you to save this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But don't be mistaken. We are merely helping you. It's entirely up to you to save this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You mustn't be careless with your life or give it up. Do you understand?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You mustn't be careless with your life or give it up. Do you understand?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You mustn't be careless with your life or give it up. Do you understand?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will save this world with my powers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will save this world with my powers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will save this world with my powers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, it has finally begun.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, it has finally begun.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, it has finally begun.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We could've used the Ark to contain the Demon Lord's power before she made her move.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We could've used the Ark to contain the Demon Lord's power before she made her move.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We could've used the Ark to contain the Demon Lord's power before she made her move.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Buy time by sacrificing the Ark, or use it to attack the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Buy time by sacrificing the Ark, or use it to attack the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Buy time by sacrificing the Ark, or use it to attack the Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I chose the latter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I chose the latter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I chose the latter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't it your first time facing a Qliphoth Game head-on?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't it your first time facing a Qliphoth Game head-on?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't it your first time facing a Qliphoth Game head-on?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think we have a chance to win if we attack?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think we have a chance to win if we attack?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think we have a chance to win if we attack?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The possibilities have always existed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The possibilities have always existed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The possibilities have always existed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All means available under the Administration, the Antagonist, and the Wolf have all gathered in one place. This is as hopeful as it can get.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All means available under the Administration, the Antagonist, and the Wolf have all gathered in one place. This is as hopeful as it can get.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All means available under the Administration, the Antagonist, and the Wolf have all gathered in one place. This is as hopeful as it can get.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can feel it. The Demon Lord is approaching.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can feel it. The Demon Lord is approaching.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can feel it. The Demon Lord is approaching.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter. For we must also move forward.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter. For we must also move forward.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter. For we must also move forward.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have you familiarized yourself with the rules?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you familiarized yourself with the rules?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you familiarized yourself with the rules?

root.m_Talk_ENG: More or less.
root.m_Talk_DEU: More or less.
root.m_Talk_FRA: More or less.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hilde. Aren't you nervous?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hilde. Aren't you nervous?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hilde. Aren't you nervous?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a fight we had to face one day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a fight we had to face one day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a fight we had to face one day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All I'm thinking about is a way to win at any cost.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All I'm thinking about is a way to win at any cost.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All I'm thinking about is a way to win at any cost.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, that's so you, Hilde.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, that's so you, Hilde.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, that's so you, Hilde.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How are you, Pavlin?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How are you, Pavlin?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How are you, Pavlin?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Tyrant of the North burned down my home. Soon, she'll set aflame the entire world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Tyrant of the North burned down my home. Soon, she'll set aflame the entire world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Tyrant of the North burned down my home. Soon, she'll set aflame the entire world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I can be of help in stopping her...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I can be of help in stopping her...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I can be of help in stopping her...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will gladly offer my life for it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will gladly offer my life for it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will gladly offer my life for it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She will go down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She will go down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She will go down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is why we're here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is why we're here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is why we're here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: 1 hour 10 minutes since the start of the battle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: 1 hour 10 minutes since the start of the battle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: 1 hour 10 minutes since the start of the battle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: 87% of all available units are lost. Time until the forefront collapses is estimated to be under 15 minutes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: 87% of all available units are lost. Time until the forefront collapses is estimated to be under 15 minutes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: 87% of all available units are lost. Time until the forefront collapses is estimated to be under 15 minutes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the Demon Lord's throne is not far away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the Demon Lord's throne is not far away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the Demon Lord's throne is not far away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If only we could keep those two Apostles occupied... the Wolf would be able to safely reach the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If only we could keep those two Apostles occupied... the Wolf would be able to safely reach the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If only we could keep those two Apostles occupied... the Wolf would be able to safely reach the Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are currently two divisions under proper command and control.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are currently two divisions under proper command and control.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are currently two divisions under proper command and control.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The two divisions can obstruct the Apostles' movements until the path is cleared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The two divisions can obstruct the Apostles' movements until the path is cleared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The two divisions can obstruct the Apostles' movements until the path is cleared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What is the likelihood of the two divisions returning safely if they were to be deployed?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What is the likelihood of the two divisions returning safely if they were to be deployed?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What is the likelihood of the two divisions returning safely if they were to be deployed?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is insufficient data on the target.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is insufficient data on the target.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is insufficient data on the target.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unless an outlier occurs, they are expected to be annihilated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unless an outlier occurs, they are expected to be annihilated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unless an outlier occurs, they are expected to be annihilated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They keep trying to block me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They keep trying to block me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They keep trying to block me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With all these C.O.s coming at me like this, I can't easily move forward.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With all these C.O.s coming at me like this, I can't easily move forward.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With all these C.O.s coming at me like this, I can't easily move forward.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The supporting artillery seems to have stopped. Have they all been wiped out?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The supporting artillery seems to have stopped. Have they all been wiped out?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The supporting artillery seems to have stopped. Have they all been wiped out?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm certain that we're almost there...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm certain that we're almost there...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm certain that we're almost there...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll keep Asmodeus' Apostles distracted! In the meantime, you two should go ahead!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll keep Asmodeus' Apostles distracted! In the meantime, you two should go ahead!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll keep Asmodeus' Apostles distracted! In the meantime, you two should go ahead!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's reckless. If we do that, you'll die before we get to reach the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's reckless. If we do that, you'll die before we get to reach the Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's reckless. If we do that, you'll die before we get to reach the Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Too many have already been sacrificed to get here!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Too many have already been sacrificed to get here!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Too many have already been sacrificed to get here!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We can't turn back now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We can't turn back now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We can't turn back now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Calm down, Pavlin. Acting recklessly will only result in losing whatever chances we have left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Calm down, Pavlin. Acting recklessly will only result in losing whatever chances we have left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Calm down, Pavlin. Acting recklessly will only result in losing whatever chances we have left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Besides... you're responsible for another life now, remember?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Besides... you're responsible for another life now, remember?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Besides... you're responsible for another life now, remember?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Master! Look out!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Master! Look out!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Master! Look out!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! There's even an Eater now? What a bother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! There's even an Eater now? What a bother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! There's even an Eater now? What a bother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's a huge hole in the C.O.'s body...
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's a huge hole in the C.O.'s body...
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's a huge hole in the C.O.'s body...

root.m_Talk_ENG: A dimension jump from an Assault Ship? Someone charged into a C.O. with that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A dimension jump from an Assault Ship? Someone charged into a C.O. with that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A dimension jump from an Assault Ship? Someone charged into a C.O. with that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's only one who's stupid enough to do something like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's only one who's stupid enough to do something like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's only one who's stupid enough to do something like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is Commander Aura of the La Mancha Stormtrooper Division...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is Commander Aura of the La Mancha Stormtrooper Division...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is Commander Aura of the La Mancha Stormtrooper Division...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've come to help after receiving orders from the Command!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've come to help after receiving orders from the Command!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've come to help after receiving orders from the Command!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I would have been injured if your aim had been slightly off, Aura.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I would have been injured if your aim had been slightly off, Aura.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I would have been injured if your aim had been slightly off, Aura.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine! I may have devised this plan, but my skilled pilot Yulia was in charge of inputting the coordinates for the dimension jump!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine! I may have devised this plan, but my skilled pilot Yulia was in charge of inputting the coordinates for the dimension jump!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine! I may have devised this plan, but my skilled pilot Yulia was in charge of inputting the coordinates for the dimension jump!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is Yulia of the Sirin Tracking Division. We have also come with orders to help the Wolf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is Yulia of the Sirin Tracking Division. We have also come with orders to help the Wolf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is Yulia of the Sirin Tracking Division. We have also come with orders to help the Wolf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness. They are all safe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank goodness. They are all safe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank goodness. They are all safe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The other divisions are nearly wiped out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The other divisions are nearly wiped out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The other divisions are nearly wiped out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It will be difficult to expect them to join us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It will be difficult to expect them to join us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It will be difficult to expect them to join us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That can't be...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That can't be...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That can't be...

root.m_Talk_ENG: In just that brief moment, all those people... died in vain...
root.m_Talk_DEU: In just that brief moment, all those people... died in vain...
root.m_Talk_FRA: In just that brief moment, all those people... died in vain...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I understand your anger, but you must stay calm, Pavlin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I understand your anger, but you must stay calm, Pavlin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I understand your anger, but you must stay calm, Pavlin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because we, the survivors, decide the outcome of this fight and the fate of the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because we, the survivors, decide the outcome of this fight and the fate of the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because we, the survivors, decide the outcome of this fight and the fate of the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes... I'm aware.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes... I'm aware.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes... I'm aware.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. The Command told you to help us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. The Command told you to help us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. The Command told you to help us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct! They told us that you would need units to hold off the Apostles!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct! They told us that you would need units to hold off the Apostles!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct! They told us that you would need units to hold off the Apostles!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We will isolate the two Apostles in a small space by borrowing Pavlin's dimension-splitting ability, and our two divisions will each take on one of them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We will isolate the two Apostles in a small space by borrowing Pavlin's dimension-splitting ability, and our two divisions will each take on one of them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We will isolate the two Apostles in a small space by borrowing Pavlin's dimension-splitting ability, and our two divisions will each take on one of them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That does sound like a surefire way to keep the Apostles busy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That does sound like a surefire way to keep the Apostles busy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That does sound like a surefire way to keep the Apostles busy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that will also block your escape routes. Do you understand what that means?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that will also block your escape routes. Do you understand what that means?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that will also block your escape routes. Do you understand what that means?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry! Retreat is not an option for us!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry! Retreat is not an option for us!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry! Retreat is not an option for us!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If this were a safe and normal operation, the Command's Paradox wouldn't have called it "Plan B."
root.m_Talk_DEU: If this were a safe and normal operation, the Command's Paradox wouldn't have called it "Plan B."
root.m_Talk_FRA: If this were a safe and normal operation, the Command's Paradox wouldn't have called it "Plan B."

root.m_Talk_ENG: If this is the best way to save the world... we will follow through with the orders given to us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If this is the best way to save the world... we will follow through with the orders given to us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If this is the best way to save the world... we will follow through with the orders given to us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, we'll leave those two to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, we'll leave those two to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, we'll leave those two to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...The Apostles' signature waveforms have sequentially disappeared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...The Apostles' signature waveforms have sequentially disappeared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...The Apostles' signature waveforms have sequentially disappeared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We have confirmed that the Apostle isolation was a success.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We have confirmed that the Apostle isolation was a success.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We have confirmed that the Apostle isolation was a success.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The estimated isolation time is 20 minutes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The estimated isolation time is 20 minutes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The estimated isolation time is 20 minutes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With this... only the last step remains.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With this... only the last step remains.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With this... only the last step remains.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Wolf is approaching the throne.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Wolf is approaching the throne.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Wolf is approaching the throne.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I almost thought no one was coming.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I almost thought no one was coming.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I almost thought no one was coming.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To be skilled enough to reach here can only mean...
root.m_Talk_DEU: To be skilled enough to reach here can only mean...
root.m_Talk_FRA: To be skilled enough to reach here can only mean...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You will be able to entertain me, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You will be able to entertain me, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You will be able to entertain me, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You didn't wait for me just to chat, did you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You didn't wait for me just to chat, did you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You didn't wait for me just to chat, did you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, shut up and come at me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, shut up and come at me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, shut up and come at me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I commend your spirit, Wolf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I commend your spirit, Wolf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I commend your spirit, Wolf.
